"'''The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series'''" was an article in [[Star Wars Gamer 1|''Star Wars Gamer'' 1]] that was written by [[Rich Handley]] and [[Joseph Bongiorno|Joe Bongiorno]] and illustrated by [[Joe Corroney]]. The article was written in an in-universe style and attributed to [[Tem Eliss]]. The article explored several [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the original [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel Star Wars]] comic series.

{{Magazine-stub|article}}
